languages.text: "Мне лишь была интересна твоя реакция. Можешь остаться".
"I was merely curious about how you would react. You may stay."
languages.original_text: "Мне лишь была интересна твоя реакция. Можешь остаться".

traits.locale_text: "I was merely curious about how you would react. You may stay."
"I was merely curious about how you would react. You may stay."
"I was merely curious about how you would react. You may stay."

languages.text: «Solo sentía curiosidad por ver su reacción. Puede quedarse».
languages.original_text: "I was merely curious about how you would react. You may stay."

traits.locale_text: «Solo sentía curiosidad por ver su reacción. Puede quedarse».

languages.text: “我只是想看看你会有什么反应。你可以留下。”
languages.original_text: "I was merely curious about how you would react. You may stay."

traits.locale_text: “我只是想看看你会有什么反应。你可以留下。”

languages.text: « Je me demandais seulement comment vous alliez réagir. Vous pouvez rester. »
languages.original_text: "I was merely curious about how you would react. You may stay."

traits.locale_text: « Je me demandais seulement comment vous alliez réagir. Vous pouvez rester. »

languages.text: "Ich war nur gespannt, wie Ihr reagieren würdet. Ihr könnt bleiben."
languages.original_text: "I was merely curious about how you would react. You may stay."

traits.locale_text: "Ich war nur gespannt, wie Ihr reagieren würdet. Ihr könnt bleiben."

languages.text: 「私はただ、あなたがどう反応するか知りたかっただけです。ここにいていい」
languages.original_text: "I was merely curious about how you would react. You may stay."

traits.locale_text: 「私はただ、あなたがどう反応するか知りたかっただけです。ここにいていい」

languages.text: "Sadece nasıl tepki vereceğini merak etmiştim. Kalabilirsin."
languages.original_text: "I was merely curious about how you would react. You may stay."

traits.locale_text: "Sadece nasıl tepki vereceğini merak etmiştim. Kalabilirsin."
